ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game is played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referee of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is part of */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plays" (
  "play_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the play is part of */,
  "play_number" INTEGER /* Number of the play */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team making the play */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player making the play */,
  "attempt" INTEGER /* Attempt number for the play */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Yards gained during the play */,
  "touchdown" INTEGER /* Whether a touchdown was scored (0 or 1) */,
  "fumble" INTEGER /* Whether a fumble occurred (0 or 1) */,
  "fumble_lost" INTEGER /* Whether the fumble was lost (0 or 1) */,
  "safety" INTEGER /* Whether a safety was scored (0 or 1) */,
  "fair_catch" INTEGER /* Whether a fair catch was made (0 or 1) */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter in which the play occurred */,
  "down" INTEGER /* Down number */,
  "distance_to_go" INTEGER /* Distance needed to gain for a new set of downs */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., pass, run, punt) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the play (e.g., gain, loss, touchdown) */,
  "penalty" INTEGER /* Whether a penalty occurred (0 or 1) */,
  "penalty_type" TEXT /* Type of penalty if applicable */,
  "penalty_yards" INTEGER /* Number of yards penalized */,
  "time_left" TEXT /* Time left in the quarter when the play occurred */,
  "play_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("play_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plays_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "play_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each play statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the statistic is for */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the statistic is for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic is for */,
  "yards_gained" INTEGER /* Total yards gained */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns scored */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Total fumbles */,
  "fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Total fumbles lost */,
  "safeties" INTEGER /* Total safeties scored */,
  "average_yards_gained" REAL /* Average yards gained per play */,
  "longest_play" INTEGER /* Longest play in terms of yards */,
  "shortest_play" INTEGER /* Shortest play in terms of yards */,
  "total_penalties" INTEGER /* Total number of penalties */,
  "penalty_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards penalized */,
  "total_plays" INTEGER /* Total number of plays made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_play_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the event is part of */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., touchdown, fumble, safety) */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter in which the event occurred */,
  "event_down" INTEGER /* Down number when the event occurred */,
  "event_distance_to_go" INTEGER /* Distance needed to gain for a new set of downs when the event occurred */,
  "event_result" TEXT /* Result of the event (e.g., gain, loss, touchdown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the statistic is for */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic is for */,
  "yards_gained" INTEGER /* Total yards gained */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns scored */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Total fumbles */,
  "fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Total fumbles lost */,
  "safeties" INTEGER /* Total safeties scored */,
  "average_yards_gained" REAL /* Average yards gained per play */,
  "longest_play" INTEGER /* Longest play in terms of yards */,
  "shortest_play" INTEGER /* Shortest play in terms of yards */,
  "total_penalties" INTEGER /* Total number of penalties */,
  "penalty_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards penalized */,
  "total_plays" INTEGER /* Total number of plays made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the statistic is for */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the statistic is for */,
  "yards_gained" INTEGER /* Total yards gained */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns scored */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Total fumbles */,
  "fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Total fumbles lost */,
  "safeties" INTEGER /* Total safeties scored */,
  "average_yards_gained" REAL /* Average yards gained per play */,
  "longest_play" INTEGER /* Longest play in terms of yards */,
  "shortest_play" INTEGER /* Shortest play in terms of yards */,
  "total_penalties" INTEGER /* Total number of penalties */,
  "penalty_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards penalized */,
  "total_plays" INTEGER /* Total number of plays made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
